title: XorSum
description:
You are given an array V, consisting of N integers V1, V2, …, VN.

Your task is to find the result of XOR (1 ≤ i ≤ j ≤ N) (Vi + Vj).
input: The first line contains integer N – the size of the array. The second line contains N space-separated integers V1, V2, …, VN.
output: The first line contains the required answer.
source: Contest, infO(1) Cup, infO(1) Cup 2017 International Round
